creator: pgollucci@FreeBSD.org
text:
7.1-STABLE FreeBSD 7.1-STABLE AMD64

apache+mod_ssl-1.3.41+2.8.31 The Apache 1.3 webserver with SSL/TLS
functionality

mod_perl-1.31       Embeds a Perl interpreter in the Apache server

This is what happens on startup. I have tracked it down to mod_perl as the
culprit.  When it's disabled the webserver starts perfectly.  

/usr/local/etc/rc.d/apache.sh start
Starting apache.
Processing config directory: /usr/local/etc/horde
Bus error (core dumped)
Exit 1

Can you please fix the port.

Thanks,

-Troy
